goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'london kings cross'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should 'leave after 11:00'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should have 'a star of 3'.
The hotel should be in the 'expensive' price range and should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'hotel type', 'address', and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should depart from london kings cross
The train should leave on thursday and should leave after 11:00
Make sure you get travel time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should have a star of 3
The hotel should be in the expensive price range and should include free wifi
Make sure you get hotel type, address, and postcode
